Critical patch. `lint-vault` and `query-wiki` were silently failing skill registration in Cowork because their `description` frontmatter values exceeded the Anthropic skill spec's 1024-character limit. The skills appeared in `/plugin` listings but the Skill tool returned `Unknown skill: claude-wiki:lint-vault` and `Unknown skill: claude-wiki:query-wiki` when invoked.

`setup-claude-wiki` (838 chars) and `add-page` (780 chars) registered normally, which is why `/setup-claude-wiki` worked in early dogfood while the other two skills were unreachable.

## Fix

Trimmed both descriptions while preserving trigger-keyword coverage and design intent:

| Skill | Before | After |
|:--|--:|--:|
| `lint-vault` | 981 chars | **767 chars** |
| `query-wiki` | 1197 chars | **863 chars** |

- `lint-vault` — collapsed the per-tier parenthetical issue lists ("missing required frontmatter, retired keys, type/status enum drift", etc.) into a single illustrative parenthesis. Dropped the redundant "check vault" English trigger (already covered by "audit vault" / "health check vault").
- `query-wiki` — compressed the graduation criteria into a single bullet, dropped the redundant "The /query-wiki skill is the structured-query path with mandatory citations and graduation handoff" recap sentence, kept the negative example (`"頭痛と耳鳴りの共通点は？" do NOT trigger this skill`) since that's the whole reason this description was rewritten in v0.1.0.1.

## Why this slipped through

Cowork's "skill registered but tool returns Unknown" failure mode is silent — the marketplace listing shows the skill as available, but actual invocation hits a length-validated reject. Static review of SKILL.md couldn't catch it; only end-to-end invocation surfaced the bug. We discovered it during the v0.1.2 test-user dogfood when `/lint-vault` and `/query-wiki` failed but `/setup-claude-wiki` worked.

## Lesson for v0.1.4+

Add a pre-commit / pre-release check that fails the build if any skill's description exceeds ~950 chars (1024 with a safety margin). Could be added to `scripts/bump-version.sh` or a separate `scripts/lint-skills.sh`.

## Verification

- `awk '/^description:/{...}' SKILL.md | wc -m` confirms all four skills under 900 chars
- Trigger keywords preserved (grep test): each skill's English + Japanese trigger lists + `/slash-command` form intact
- v0.1.0.1 negative-example fix on `query-wiki` ("bare questions don't trigger this skill") preserved
